steps.title: Identify the core requirement: a nontraditional design element
steps.content:
The task requires connecting a quotation to a nontraditional design element.

This eliminates any answer that identifies a traditional Diné pattern (stripes, zigzags, diamonds) as the relevant element.

The chosen element must be something distinctly modern or pop culture-inspired that Cody added to her work.

steps.title: Match the quotation to the nontraditional element
steps.content:
Choice B connects Cody's quote about “this world of pixelization” to the blocky digital font in Only Love Can Break Your Heart—a specific nontraditional element that the quotation directly explains.

Choice A identifies a traditional element (the diamond pattern), Choice C misapplies the quotation to traditionally Diné diamonds, and Choice D cites a quotation without pinpointing a particular design element.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
